steps.name: And User selects a level from the Level dropdown
Then Only courses matching the selected level should be displayed

description:
As an LMS user
  I want to filter the courses by category
  So that I can view courses of a selected category
fullName: lms_smartcliff:src/test/Features/Filter.feature#Verify filtering courses by Level displays only matching courses
